rationale: Current learning_rate of 0.1 with n_estimators=700 may be slightly aggressive for temporal generalization. Reducing to 0.09 with potential n_estimators increase allows finer gradient steps and better calibration on 2023+ test data. Max_depth=7 is clearly optimal (Exp 111,114,116,117,119,120 consistent at 0.185762), so focus on learning dynamics.
